# Generated by google (gemini-2.5-flash)
# Prompt: Build an Istio IngressGateway configuration that routes HTTP traffic to services. Configure Gateway for port 80 without TLS for simplicity. Use HTTP for all ingress traffic since we have a load balancer handling TLS termination upstream. This is for our Istio service mesh ingress.
# Category: service_mesh_security

apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: Gateway
metadata:
  name: http-gateway
  namespace: istio-system
spec:
  selector:
    istio: ingressgateway # Use the default Istio ingress gateway
  servers:
  - port:
      number: 80
      name: http
      protocol: HTTP
    hosts:
    - "*"
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: VirtualService
metadata:
  name: http-virtualservice
  namespace: default # Or the namespace where your services reside
spec:
  hosts:
  - "*" # Matches all hostnames defined in the Gateway
  gateways:
  - http-gateway
  http:
  - match:
    - uri:
        prefix: / # Example: Match all incoming requests
    route:
    - destination:
        host: your-service-name # Replace with the actual name of your Kubernetes service
        port:
          number: 80 # Replace with the port your service exposes for HTTP traffic
